untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a 'Divergence Indicator' computed as normalized price position difference between primary security (S&P 500) and companion series (e.g., Dow Jones Transports). This multi-series relative divergence metric is not available in the allowed indicators list. The price_pos_20 indicator only measures single-series position within range, not cross-series divergence. A custom divergence calculation would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 as proxy for normalized position, but true signal requires comparison between two separate time series. Entry thresholds mapped as: >0.70 approximates companion overbought (+30 divergence), <0.30 approximates companion oversold (-30 divergence). Exit at 0.50 (mean/midpoint) attempts to capture mean reversion logic. However, without true divergence metric, this translation is fundamentally incomplete.
